name: Katrina Pilchman
shortBio: Reprises Mary Magdalene with Midnight Productions and brings both stage and classical performance experience.
fullBio: Katrina Pilchman is excited and honored to be reprising her role as Mary Magdalene in Midnight Productions' Jesus Christ Superstar. Previous stage credits include Jesus Christ Superstar, FABLES, The Hunchback of Notre Dame, and Beauty and the Beast. Her operatic and classical experience includes performances with Delaware Valley Opera and Boston University, along with soloist work in sacred and concert repertoire. She currently directs the general music, choir, and instrumental programs at Villa Victoria Academy in Ewing, New Jersey.
